message:
test: add 7 section gate scripts with test suites and batch-generate 238 verification artifacts

- Create section gate check scripts for 10.0, 10.1, 10.2, 10.3, 10.19, 10.20, 10.21
- Create matching unit test suites (20-21 tests each, all passing)
- Gate results: 10.0 (38/38), 10.1 (31/31), 10.2 (45/45), 10.3 (32/32),
  10.19 (55/55), 10.20 (60/60), 10.21 (65/65)
- Batch-run 121 existing check scripts to generate 118 missing check_report.json
- Batch-run 136 self-tests to generate 120 missing check_self_test.txt
- Save bd-2zip (ATC verifier) check report and self-test artifacts
- Update gate verification evidence and summaries for all 7 sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
